matchedCandidate.query: "Strombosia glaucescens" Afina timber wood grain radial longitudinal section tangential longitudinal section
matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: Page 9 of the BVRio/Forestry Commission Ghana/CSIR-FORIG booklet explicitly labels the species sheet AFINA and gives the scientific name Strombosia glaucescens (Engl.). The retained raster is embedded in that same species sheet.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at its original 228 × 375 resolution. The frame shows a second longitudinally cut wood face with clearly visible grain; there is no living plant, bark-only surface, furniture, diagram, or microscope field. It was extracted directly from the PDF, but its resolution is modest and should be reviewed accordingly.
matchedCandidate.creator: BVRio / Forestry Commission Ghana / CSIR-FORIG
